name: Single filer at low income (MXN 120,000/year)
description: Employee earning MXN 120,000 annually (~MXN 10,000/month). Qualifies for employment subsidy. ISR partially offset by subsidio al empleo.

sources.description: Calculated using 2026 ISR annual table from SAT Annex 8 and IMSS employee rates from OECD
